idea-plugin.name: Gruvbox Revival
idea-plugin.description:
Retro groove colors for IntelliJ, faithful to the original gruvbox Vim theme — built Java-first and for the New UI.

  • Three dark variants: Hard, Medium, and Soft contrast
  • Vim-faithful syntax mapping: keywords red, strings green, types yellow
  • Explicit editor color scheme coverage for Java, XML, properties, YAML, JSON, and JavaScript; Gradle scripts, SQL, and other languages inherit the same gruvbox defaults
